# Server-Side Connectors

Tealium integrates with hundreds of server-side connectors. Find your preferred vendor and start building better customer experiences.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Server-Side Connectors


- [Acoustic Campaign Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/acoustic-campaign-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Acoustic Campaign connector.

- [Acoustic Exchange Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/acoustic-exchange-connector/): Requirements Acoustic Exchange Account Tealium Events Endpoint Authentication Key Connector Actions Action Name AudienceStream EventStream Publish …

- [Acoustic Transact Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/acoustic-transact-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Acoustic Transact (formerly Silverpop Transact) connector.

- [ActiveCampaign Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/activecampaign-connector/): This article describes how to set up the ActiveCampaign connector.

- [Adestra Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adestra-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adestra connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [AdForm Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adform-connector/): Adform is a cloud technology built for agencies and advertisers, who want to make display advertising the best performance channel by use of personalized targeting, real time bidding and rich media. The Platform includes campaign planning, ad serving, optimization, analytics, reports and much more. This article describes how to set up the Adform Connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Adform Segments Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adform-segments-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adform Segments connector.

- [Adition PostTracking Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adition-posttracking-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adition PostTracking connector.

- [Adition Tagging Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adition-tagging-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adition Tagging connector.

- [Adjust Events API Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adjust-events-api-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adjust Events API connector.

- [Adobe Analytics 1.4 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-analytics-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Analytics 1.4 connector.

- [Adobe Analytics 2.0 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-analytics-2-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Analytics 2.0 connector.

- [Adobe Audience Manager DCS Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-audience-manager-dcs-connector/): Adobe's Data Collection Servers (DCS) provides a Server-to-Server API to collect audience user data to be managed in Adobe Audience Manager. This article describes how to set up the service in your Customer Data Hub profile.

- [Adobe Campaign Connector Setup Guide for AudienceStream](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-campaign-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Campaign connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Adobe Campaign Classic Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-campaign-classic-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Campaign Classic connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Adobe Campaign Standard Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-campaign-standard-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Campaign Standard connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Adobe Campaign Standard (OAuth) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-campaign-standard-oauth-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Campaign Standard (OAuth) connector.

- [Adobe Campaign v8 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-campaign-v8-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Campaign v8 connector.

- [Adobe Experience Platform Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-aep-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Experience Platform connector.

- [Adobe Journey Optimizer Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-journey-optimizer-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Journey Optimizer connector.

- [Adobe Target Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/adobe-target-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Target connector.

- [Agillic Recipients Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/agillic-recipients-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Agillic Recipients connector.

- [Airship Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/airship-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Airship connector.

- [Algolia Insights Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/algolia-insights-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Algolia Insights connector.

- [Amazon Ads Audience Management Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-ads-audience-management-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Ads Audience Management connector.

- [Amazon Ads Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-ads-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Ads Conversions connector.

- [Amazon Ads Data Manager Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-ads-data-manager-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Ads Data Manager connector.

- [Amazon Advertising DSP Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-advertising-dsp-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Advertising DSP connector.

- [Amazon AWS SQS Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-aws-sqs-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AWS SQS connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Amazon Bedrock AI Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-bedrock-ai-connector/): Set up the Amazon Bedrock AI connector to send Tealium event and visitor data to foundation models, managed prompts, or multi-step Bedrock workflows for real-time enrichment.

- [AWS Amazon Connect Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-connect-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Connect connector.

- [Amazon EventBridge Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-eventbridge-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon EventBridge connector.

- [Amazon Pinpoint Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-pinpoint-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Pinpoint connector.

- [Amazon Redshift Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-redshift-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Redshift connector.

- [Amazon S3 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amazon-s3-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon S3 connector.

- [Amobee Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amobee-connector-setup-guide/): This article describes how to set up the Amobee connector.

- [Amplitude Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amplitude-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amplitude connector.

- [Amplitude Connector Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amplitude-connector-setup-guide-deprecated/): This article describes how to set up the Amplitude connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Amplitude Identify Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/amplitude-identify-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Amplitude Identify connector.

- [Anthropic Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/anthropic-connector/): Set up the Anthropic connector to send a prompt with Tealium event or visitor data and return model responses for real-time enrichment.

- [Apache Kafka Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/apache-kafka-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Apache Kafka connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Appcues Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/appcues-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Appcues connector.

- [AppsFlyer App Events Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/appsflyer-app-events-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AppsFlyer App Events connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [APSIS Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/apsis-connector/): This article describes how to set up the APSIS connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [AT Internet Piano Analytics Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/at-internet-piano-analytics-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AT Internet Piano Analytics connector.

- [AudienceStore Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/audiencestore-connector/): With the AudienceStore Connector, you can send visitor profile data to Tealium's Amazon S3 bucket. A visitor profile contains data pertinent to the visitor and their visit (excluding events), typically captured by the Tealium Collect Tag. Rather than exporting one visitor profile at a time, the AudienceStore connector selects visitor profiles that share common behaviors to send to AudienceStore.

- [Avo Inspector Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/avo-inspector-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Avo Inspector connector.

- [Awin Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/awin-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Awin Conversions connector.

- [AWS Firehose Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/aws-firehose-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AWS Firehose connector.

- [AWS Firehose (Tealium-Provided Credentials) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/aws-firehose-tealium-provided-credentials-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AWS Firehose (Tealium Provided Credentials) connector.

- [AWS Kinesis Streams Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/aws-kinesis-streams-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AWS Kinesis Streams connector.

- [AWS Kinesis Streams (Tealium-Provided Credentials) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/aws-kinesis-streams-tealium-provided-credentials-connector/): This article describes how to set up the AWS Kinesis Streams (Tealium-Provided Credentials) connector.

- [Basis Technologies DSP Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/basis-technologies-dsp-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Basis Technologies DSP connector.

- [Bloomreach Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/bloomreach-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Bloomreach connector.

- [Branch Events Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/branch-events-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Branch Events DSP connector.

- [Braze Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/braze-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Braze connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Campaign Monitor Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/campaign-monitor-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Campaign Monitor connector.

- [Campaigner Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/campaigner-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Campaigner connector.

- [CDK CRM Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/cdk-connector/): This article describes how to set up the CDK CRM connector.

- [Centro DSP Connector Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/centro-dsp-connector-setup-guide-deprecated/): This article describes how to set up the Centro Demand-Side Platform (DSP) connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Cheetah Digital by Marigold Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/cheetah-digital-by-marigold-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Cheetah Digital by Marigold connector.

- [CJ Tracking API Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/cj-tracking-api-connector/): This article describes how to set up the CJ Tracking API connector.

- [ClickSend Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/clicksend-connector/): This article describes how to set up the ClickSend connector.

- [Clinch Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/clinch-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Clinch connector.

- [Confluent Kafka Connect Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/confluent-kafka-connect-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Confluent Kafka Connect connector.

- [Connector Insights: Amazon Ads Data Manager](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-amazon-ads-data-manager/): Access Amazon Ads Data Manager insights to review audience dataset metrics.

- [Connector Insights: Facebook Conversions](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-facebook-conversions/): Access Facebook Conversions insights to review event match quality, customer parameter coverage, and offline data quality scores.

- [Connector Insights: Facebook Custom Audiences](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-facebook-custom-audiences/): Insights brings additional connector data from the vendor into your Tealium account to help you evaluate its performance.

- [Connector Insights: Google Ads Customer Match](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-google-ads-customer-match/): Insights brings additional connector data from the vendor into your Tealium account to help you evaluate its performance.

- [Connector Insights: Google DV360 Customer Match Connector](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-google-dv360-customer-match/): This article describes how to access connector insights and explore insights data for the Google DV360 Customer Match connector.

- [Connector Insights: Snapchat Conversions](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-snapchat-conversions/): This article describes how to access connector insights and explore insights data for the Snapchat Conversions connector.

- [Connector Insights: X Custom Audiences](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/connector-insights-x-custom-audiences/): Connector Insights brings additional data from the vendor into your Tealium account to help you evaluate its performance.

- [Cordial Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/cordial-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Cordial connector.

- [Coveo Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/coveo-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Coveo connector.

- [Criteo Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/criteo-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Criteo connector.

- [Criteo Audiences Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/criteo-audiences-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Criteo Audiences connector.

- [Criteo Audiences (OAuth) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/criteo-audiences-oauth-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Criteo Audiences (OAuth) connector.

- [Databricks Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/databricks-customer-provided-storage-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Databricks connector.

- [Datadog Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/datadog-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Datadog connector.

- [DMD Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/dmd-connector/): This article describes how to set up the DMD connector.

- [Doceree Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/doceree-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Doceree connector.

- [Domo JSON Webhook Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/domo-json-webhook-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Domo JSON Webhook connector.

- [dotdigital Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/dotdigital-connector/): This article describes how to set up the dotdigital connector.

- [DoubleClick Ad Exchange Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/doubleclick-ad-exchange-connector/): This article describes how to set up the DoubleClick for Ad Exchange connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Dynamic Yield Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/dynamic-yield-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Dynamic Yield connector.

- [Elastic Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/elastic-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Elastic connector.

- [Emarsys Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/emarsys-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Emarsys connector.

- [Epsilon Event API Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/epsilon-event-api-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Epsilon Event API connector.

- [Exactag S2S Tracking Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/exactag-s2s-tracking-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Exactag S2S Tracking connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Experian Marketing Suite Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/experian-marketing-suite-connector/): This article describes how to configure Experian Marketing Suite in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Facebook and Tealium Customer Data Hub (Series)](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-connector-series/): The following is a list of Tealium integrations for Facebook products

- [Facebook App Events Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-app-events-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Facebook App Events connector.

- [Facebook Audiences Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-audiences-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Facebook Audiences connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Facebook Audiences Customer-Provided Credentials Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-audiences-customer-provided-credentials-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Facebook Audiences Customer-Provided Credentials connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Facebook Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Facebook Conversions connector in your account.

- [Facebook Messenger Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/facebook-messenger-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Facebook Messenger connector.

- [File Transfer Protocol (SFTP, FTPS) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/ftp-connector/): This article describes how to set up the File Transfer Protocol connector.

- [Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/firebase-cloud-messaging-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Firebase Cloud Messaging connector.

- [Flashtalking User Segments Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/flashtalking-user-segments-connector/): You can use the Flashtalking connector to add users to segments created in the Flashtalking Pixel Manager. These segments can then be targets using a Decision Tree or Hedge import in the Campaign Manager or Creative Manager interface.

- [Freshdesk Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/freshdesk-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Freshdesk connector.

- [FullStory Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/fullstory-connector/): This article describes how to set up the FullStory connector.

- [FullStory API Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/fullstory-user-api-connector/): This article describes how to set up the FullStory API connector.

- [Google Ad Manager 360 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ad-manager-360-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ad Manager 360 connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Google Ad Manager Audience Integration Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ad-manager-audience-integration-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ad Manager Audience Integration connector.

- [Google Ads Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ads Conversions connector.

- [Google Ads Customer Match (Tealium-Provided Credentials) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-customer-match-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ads Customer Match connector, which uses Tealium-Provided Credentials.

- [Migrate Google Ads Customer Match actions to the Google Data Manager API](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-customer-match-data-manager-api-migration/): This article explains the new Google Ads Customer Match actions that use the Google Data Manager API, why we are introducing them, and how to migrate from the existing Google Ads API–based actions.

- [Google Ads Enhanced Conversions for Leads Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-enhanced-conversions-for-leads-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ads Enhanced Conversions for Leads connector.

- [Google Ads Enhanced Conversions for Web Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-enhanced-conversions-for-web-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ads Enhanced Conversions for Web connector.

- [Google Ads Store Sales Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-ads-store-sales-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Ads Store Sales connector.

- [Google Analytics Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-analytics-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Analytics Connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-analytics-4-measurement-protocol-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol connector.

- [Google BigQuery Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-bigquery-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google BigQuery connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Google Cloud Pub/Sub Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-cloud-pubsub-connector-service-account/): This article describes how to set up the Google Cloud Pub/Sub connectors. Tealium offers two Pub/Sub connectors in the Connector Marketplace: the Google Could Pub/Sub Connector (3-legged OAuth) and Google Cloud Pub/Sub (Service Account) Connector (2-legged OAuth).

- [Google Cloud Storage Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-cloud-storage-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Cloud Storage connector.

- [Google Display & Video 360 Customer Match Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-dv-360-customer-match-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Display & Video 360 Customer Match connector.

- [Google Display and Video 360 Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-display-video-360-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Display & Video 360 connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Google Floodlight (CM360/SA360/DV360) Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-floodlight-connector/): This article describes how to configure the Google Floodlight (CM360/SA360/DV360) Connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Google SA360 Enhanced Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-sa360-enhanced-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google SA360 Enhanced Conversions connector.

- [Google Sheets Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-sheets-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Google Sheets connector.

- [Google Vertex AI Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-vertex-ai-connector/): Set up the Google Vertex AI connector to invoke Vertex AI models with Tealium event data and return model responses for real-time visitor enrichment.

- [Google Vertex AI Search for Commerce Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/google-vertex-commerce-connector/): Set up this connector to send Tealium event data to Google Vertex AI Search for personalized and intuitive shopping experiences.

- [Heap Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/heap-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Heap connector.

- [Hubspot Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/hubspot-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Hubspot connector.

- [Impact Conversions Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/impact-conversions-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Impact Conversions connector.

- [Impact Page Loads Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/impact-page-loads-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Impact Page Loads connector.

- [InnovidXP Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/innovidxp-connector/): This article describes how to set up the InnovidXP connector.

- [Insider Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/insider-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Insider connector.

- [Insightly Connector Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/insightly-connector-deprecated/): This article describes how to set up the Insightly connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [Insightly CRM Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/insightly-crm-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Insightly CRM connector.

- [intealliAd Connector Setup Guide for AudienceStream](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/intelliad-connector/): This article describes how to set up the intealliAd connector.

- [iSpot TV Conversion Tracking Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/ispot-tv-conversion-tracking-connector/): This article describes how to set up the iSpot TV Conversion Tracking connector.

- [Iterable Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/iterable-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Iterable connector.

- [Iterable Connector Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/iterable-connector-deprecated/): This article describes how to set up the Iterable connector in your Customer Data Hub account.

- [KAYAK Conversion Tracking Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/kayak-conversion-tracking-connector/): This article describes how to set up the KAYAK Conversion Tracking connector.

- [Khoros Connector Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/server-side-connectors/khoros-connector/): This article describes how to set up the Khoros connector.
